Class CustomerInformationController

      public CustomerInformationController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      This method initializes the controller class. This method is called automatically after the fxml file has been loaded. It populates the appointments table in the AppointmentScreen.fxml.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - The location used to resolve relative paths for the root object, or null if the location is not known.
      resourceBundle - The resource bundle to use for localizing the root object or null if the root object was not localized.

    • addCustomerButton

      public void addCustomerButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method handles the add customer information button event. It takes you to the AddCustomerScreen and allows you to add a new customer to the Customer information table.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The add customer button click event.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while loading the AddCustomerScreen data.

    • modifyCustomerButton

      public void modifyCustomerButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException, SQLException
      This method handles the modify customer button event. It takes you to the ModifyCustomerScreen and allows you to modify an existing customers information in the customer information table.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The modify customer information button click event.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the ModifyCustomerScreen.fxml file cannot be loaded.
      SQLException - If an error occurs while loading the ModifyCustomerScreen data.

    • mainMenuButton

      public void mainMenuButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method handles the Main Menu button. It navigates the user back to the Appointments screen.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The Main Menu button click event.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the AppointmentScreen.fxml file cannot be loaded.
      SQLException - If an error occurs while loading the AppointmentScreen data.

    • deleteCustomerButton

      public void deleteCustomerButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws SQLException
      This method handles the delete customer button. It allows you to delete a selected customer from the Customer Information table. A pop-up will ask if your sure you want to delete. If you click OK, the customer's information will be deleted. If you click Cancel, the customer's information will not be deleted and no changes will be made.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The delete customer button click event.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while loading the CustomerScreen data.
